data.title: Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited Releases 2025 Environmental, Social and Governance Report
data.description: Announced on April 30, 2026, Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited, a prominent lifestyle group in China trading on NASDAQ under ATAT, has unveiled its 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) report. Detailing the Company's management principles and notable accomplishments in environmental conservation, societal accountability, and governance standards for the period concluding on December 31, 2025, the report underscores Atour's intensified commitment to embedding sustainability principles into its future growth trajectory.

data.title: Afarak Group: Production report Q1 2026
data.description: At 08:30 in London and 10:30 in Helsinki on April 30, 2026, Afarak Group SE, trading on the London Stock Exchange as AFRK and on NASDAQ as AFAGR, released a significant announcement.

data.title: Meta introduces stablecoin payments for creators in Philippines, Colombia. Striving after Libra setback in 2019, they launch stablecoin rollout amidst regulatory challenges in 2022.
data.description: In a recent development, Meta's foray into stablecoins is making headlines years after its initial venture with Libra in 2019. The tech giant had to abandon its Libra project in 2022 following regulatory challenges.

data.title: Senator Tillis aims to advance crypto bill in Senate Banking, citing progress on CLARITY Act. Time to vote soon. #cryptocurrency #legislation #Senate
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis, a Republican, stated that significant advancements have been made on the Senate's version of the CLARITY Act. He emphasized that the time has come for lawmakers to cast their votes on moving the bill forward.

data.title: Dow Tumbles Over 250 Points As Oil Prices Rally: Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a stagnant market sentiment, staying in the "Greed" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks experienced a decline, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 250 points, marking losses for the fifth consecutive session. Crude oil prices saw an increase amidst concerns over renewed disruptions in Hormuz. Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ: ADP) surpassed expectations with its third-quarter financial results, while Brinker International Inc. (NYSE: EAT) reported positive third-quarter earnings. U.S. wholesale inventories climbed by 1.4% month-over-month to $932.8 billion in March, following a revised 0.9% gain in February. The goods deficit extended to $87.9 billion in March from $83.5 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Philippines: TotalEnergies and Nextnorth Reach Financial Close and Start Construction of a 440 MW Solar Project
data.description: TotalEnergies, in partnership with Nextnorth, a renewable energy developer in the Philippines, have confirmed the financial closure and commencement of construction for a solar power plant with a capacity of 440 MWp. Situated in Ilagan City, Isabela Province, the project is jointly owned by TotalEnergies (65%) and Nextnorth (35%) and is anticipated to be operational by the conclusion of 2027. Upon completion, the plant is expected to generate 13.5 TWh of energy over a span of 20 years.

data.title: Tenchijin Announces Partnership with Aqualter
data.description: In Chartres, France, Tenchijin Inc., a leading Japanese space-tech company focused on sustainable water infrastructure management, has recently partnered with Aqualter. The partnership, established in April 2026, involves a Strategic Software License Agreement. As part of this agreement, Tenchijin’s advanced platform, KnoWaterleak, utilizing satellite data and artificial intelligence, will be implemented in Aqualter's extensive water service operation initiative for metropolitan Chartres. This collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency of water leakage detection and overall water management in the area.

data.title: HI-VIEW COMMENCES TRADING ON AMERICA’S OTCQB MARKETPLACE UNDER “GXLDF”
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 30, 2026, Hi-View Resources Inc. ("Hi-View" or the "Company") has revealed that its common shares are now being traded on the OTCQB Venture Market under the symbol "GXLDF". With the aim of boosting visibility among U.S. investors and facilitating trading access, the Company's shares are listed under the tickers CSE: GXLD; OTCQB: GXLDF; FSE: B630. This move is significant as it allows for increased exposure and easier trading for interested parties.

data.title: 21shares Partners with Kaiko Indices to Enhance Pricing Precision Across European Single-Asset Crypto Suite
data.description: On April 30, 2026, 21Shares, a prominent player in cryptocurrency exchange-traded products, announced a successful shift of the underlying index provider for a significant portion of its European single-asset product range to Kaiko Indices. Kaiko Indices, a BMR-registered benchmark administrator, ensures adherence to the most rigorous compliance standards for institutional product launches. This move marks a strategic development in 21Shares’ operations and emphasizes its commitment to offering reliable and compliant products in the market.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Mastercard Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE: MA) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Thursday, April 30. Analysts predict earnings of $4.41 per share, up from $3.73 per share last year. The estimated revenue for the quarter is $8.26 billion, compared to $7.25 billion in the previous year. Recently, Mastercard revealed its plan to acquire BVNK, a stablecoin infrastructure leader, for up to $1.8 billion on March 17. On Wednesday, Mastercard's shares closed at $525.23, marking a 3.5% increase.
